_comment: Raw SignalEvent fixtures — one per source type. Used by workers in USE_MOCK_DATA=true mode to simulate ingestion without hitting live APIs.

signal_events.title: Stripe raises $200M Series C to expand AI payment capabilities
signal_events.description: Stripe has secured $200M in Series C funding led by Sequoia Capital, with plans to double its engineering team and expand into European markets.
